rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee'S Motion For A Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Trustees motion for a protective order -- The court orders that if the hearing on the demurrer remains on the August 30, 2004 probate calendar at 11:00 a.m., the parties shall appear at 10:30 a.m. If the hearing on the demurrer has been continued, the parties shall appear telephonically by calling (415) 551-3688 at 10:00 a.m. to set a date for hearing on the motion for a protective order. (610/BCHAN)
